title: Simple CV Template That Gets Interviews

cv.name: Tom Fletcher
cv.title: Operations Assistant
cv.summary: Dependable operations assistant with 3 years supporting warehouse and office teams. Strong organiser with excellent attention to detail and a track record of meeting deadlines in busy environments.

bullets: Coordinated daily dispatch schedules for 12 drivers with 98% on-time rate
Updated inventory spreadsheets and flagged stock issues before shortages
Processed shipping documentation and answered supplier queries
Supported monthly stock counts with accurate record-keeping
